# UI Pirate — Product Design & Development Agency

> UI Pirate is a product design and frontend development agency founded by Vishal Anand. We turn product ideas into shipped products — handling everything from product thinking and competitive analysis to UX/UI design and complex enterprise frontend development in Angular, React, and Next.js. Serving Fortune 500 and enterprise clients across USA, UK, Singapore, India, and Australia.

## What Makes Us Different

We are NOT just a design agency that makes things look pretty. Our approach is simple: **have a conversation about your product — we carry the rest.** From a few lines of your vision, we help you:

- **Think through your product** — Product thinking, competitive analysis, market positioning
- **Plan the architecture** — Information architecture, user flows, decision-making frameworks
- **Design the experience** — UX research, wireframes, high-fidelity UI, prototypes
- **Build the product** — Production-ready frontend code in Angular, React, Next.js
- **Ship and scale** — Performance optimization, design systems, component libraries

We specialize in **complex enterprise applications** — the kind with multi-role dashboards, data-heavy interfaces, intricate user flows, and real business logic. Not just marketing pages, but actual working products.

## About

**Core Technologies**: Angular, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer, Webflow
**Founder**: Vishal Anand — 9+ years of experience in product design & enterprise frontend development
**Team**: Vishal Anand (Founder & Lead Designer), Danish Ansari (Lead Frontend Developer), Syed Musaddiq (Lead UX Designer), Kartik Kumar (Lead Graphics & Motion), Aniket (Lead Backend Developer)
**Headquarters**: India (serving clients globally)
**Founded**: 2015
**Projects Shipped**: 50+ products with 5.0 rating

## Services

- **SaaS Web & Mobile App Design & Development**: End-to-end product design and frontend development in Angular, React, and Next.js. From idea to shipped product — product thinking, competitive analysis, information architecture, UX/UI design, prototyping, and production-ready code. Timeline: 1-2 months.
- **Landing Pages & Business Websites**: High-converting landing pages and corporate websites. We think through your positioning, competitive landscape, and user journey — then design + develop in Angular, React, Next.js, Framer, or Webflow. Timeline: 2-4 weeks.
- **UI Development & Frontend Engineering**: Production-ready frontend development in Angular (v14+), React, and Next.js. Specializing in complex enterprise applications — multi-role dashboards, data-heavy interfaces, API integration, and performance optimization.
- **Design Systems & Component Libraries**: Custom design tokens, branded UI kits, documented and dev-ready Angular/React component libraries for scalable product teams. Timeline: 1-4 weeks.
- **Graphic Design**: Brand identity, infographics, newsletters, website graphics, social media visuals, and print-ready marketing materials.
- **Motion Graphics & Video Editing**: 2D/3D animations, social media reels/ads, explainer videos, sound design, color grading, and motion graphics for web and product.
- **UX Audits & Consultation**: Heuristic analysis, usability testing, friction point identification, and strategic UX recommendations for existing products.
- **3D Animation & Rendering**: 3D product visualization, architectural rendering, and animated 3D assets for marketing and product use.

## Our Approach

1. **Listen** — You share your vision, even if it's just a few lines of an idea
2. **Think** — We do competitive analysis, market research, product thinking
3. **Plan** — Information architecture, user flows, feature prioritization
4. **Design** — Wireframes → High-fidelity UI → Interactive prototypes
5. **Build** — Production-ready Angular/React code, API integration, testing
6. **Ship** — Deployment, documentation, handoff, and ongoing support

## Notable Clients & Projects

- **Ipsos** (Israel) — Enterprise research platform redesign for VP of R&D
- **Khaitan & Co** (India) — India's leading corporate law firm
- **Xperiti** (New York, USA) — SaaS research platform for CEO & Founder
- **RevUp AI** (Dallas, Texas, USA) — AI SaaS platform for CEO
- **Sarge** (USA) — Real-time legal and policy support platform for officers in the field
- **Biotex Medical** (Texas, USA) — MedTech & medical device development
- **Bird** (San Francisco, USA) — Brand & product design for CEO
- **Awesome Health Club** (California, USA) — Platform design for Seed Investor
- **ArthAlpha** (Bangalore, India) — Fintech trading platform for Co-Founder
- **APAC Law Firm** (New Delhi, India) — AI-powered LegalTech platform
- **Netzhill** (Ontario, Canada) — Product design for Founder
- **Rings & I** (India) — E-commerce platform on Shopify
- **ION** — Medical supply chain SaaS platform
- **Brahmastra** — Fintech trading platform
- **StayPe** — Rental property management platform

## Industries Served

SaaS, Fintech, HealthTech, LegalTech, E-commerce, EdTech, PropTech, AI/ML Applications, Enterprise Software
